# Burrow

> Burrow is a modular Go web framework for server-rendered web applications. Built on Chi, Bun/SQLite, and Go's html/template. Deploy as a single binary.

Burrow follows the Django/Rails philosophy: composable apps with their own routes, migrations, middleware, and templates — but with Go's performance and single-binary deployment. It uses embedded SQLite (pure Go, no CGO) so applications need zero external dependencies at runtime.

Burrow is designed for server-rendered web applications, not API-only services.

## Core Concepts

- [Quick Start](https://oliverandrich.codeberg.page/burrow/getting-started/quickstart/): Minimal app setup
- [Creating an App](https://oliverandrich.codeberg.page/burrow/guide/creating-an-app/): Build a custom app with routes, templates, and migrations
- [Core Interfaces](https://oliverandrich.codeberg.page/burrow/reference/interfaces/): App, Migratable, HasRoutes, HasMiddleware, HasTemplates, Configurable, and more
- [Core Functions](https://oliverandrich.codeberg.page/burrow/reference/core-functions/): HandlerFunc, Handle, RenderTemplate, Bind, Validate, JSON, Text, HTML
- [Routing](https://oliverandrich.codeberg.page/burrow/guide/routing/): Handlers, error handling, URL parameters, middleware
- [Database](https://oliverandrich.codeberg.page/burrow/guide/database/): SQLite setup, PRAGMAs, Bun ORM usage, repository pattern
- [Layouts & Rendering](https://oliverandrich.codeberg.page/burrow/guide/layouts/): Template rendering, layout wrapping, HTMX support
- [Configuration](https://oliverandrich.codeberg.page/burrow/guide/configuration/): CLI flags, environment variables, TOML config
- [Migrations](https://oliverandrich.codeberg.page/burrow/guide/migrations/): Per-app SQL migrations with tracking

## Contrib Apps

- [Auth](https://oliverandrich.codeberg.page/burrow/contrib/auth/): WebAuthn/passkey authentication with recovery codes
- [Session](https://oliverandrich.codeberg.page/burrow/contrib/session/): Cookie-based sessions via gorilla/sessions
- [CSRF](https://oliverandrich.codeberg.page/burrow/contrib/csrf/): CSRF protection via gorilla/csrf
- [Admin](https://oliverandrich.codeberg.page/burrow/contrib/admin/): Admin panel coordinator with ModelAdmin CRUD
- [i18n](https://oliverandrich.codeberg.page/burrow/contrib/i18n/): Locale detection and translations
- [Bootstrap](https://oliverandrich.codeberg.page/burrow/contrib/bootstrap/): Bootstrap 5 CSS/JS, dark mode, layout
- [htmx](https://oliverandrich.codeberg.page/burrow/contrib/htmx/): HTMX integration with request/response helpers
- [Jobs](https://oliverandrich.codeberg.page/burrow/contrib/jobs/): SQLite-backed background job queue
- [Uploads](https://oliverandrich.codeberg.page/burrow/contrib/uploads/): File upload storage with content-hashed serving
- [Messages](https://oliverandrich.codeberg.page/burrow/contrib/messages/): Flash messages
- [Rate Limiting](https://oliverandrich.codeberg.page/burrow/contrib/ratelimit/): Per-client token bucket rate limiting
- [Static Files](https://oliverandrich.codeberg.page/burrow/contrib/staticfiles/): Content-hashed static file serving
- [Healthcheck](https://oliverandrich.codeberg.page/burrow/contrib/healthcheck/): /healthz endpoint

## Reference

- [Server & Registry](https://oliverandrich.codeberg.page/burrow/reference/server/): Server boot sequence, registry API
- [Configuration Reference](https://oliverandrich.codeberg.page/burrow/reference/configuration/): All flags, env vars, TOML keys
- [Template Functions](https://oliverandrich.codeberg.page/burrow/reference/template-functions/): Built-in template functions
- [Context Helpers](https://oliverandrich.codeberg.page/burrow/reference/context-helpers/): Request context accessors

## Optional

- [Tutorial](https://oliverandrich.codeberg.page/burrow/tutorial/): Build a complete polls app step by step (7 parts)
- [TLS](https://oliverandrich.codeberg.page/burrow/guide/tls/): TLS modes, ACME/Let's Encrypt, self-signed certs
- [Deployment](https://oliverandrich.codeberg.page/burrow/guide/deployment/): Production deployment guide
- [Contributing](https://oliverandrich.codeberg.page/burrow/contributing/): Development setup and contribution workflow
- [Changelog](https://oliverandrich.codeberg.page/burrow/changelog/): Version history
